description: Install dependencies and verify the existing project builds and typechecks cleanly before making changes.
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/AxonRouter to install all dependencies
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify typecheck passes (baseline)
Run `npm run test` to verify existing tests pass (baseline)
acceptance_criteria: npm run test passes or documents any pre-existing failures
findings: All baselines pass cleanly. npm install: 963 packages, 4 vulnerabilities (2 moderate, 2 high) but no errors. tsc --noEmit: exit 0. vitest: 188 test files passed (1056 tests, 22 skipped, 1 file skipped). Node 22.22.3 installed via mise (MISE_NODE_VERIFY=false required due to gpg-agent not being available in sandbox). npm 10.9.8.
